title: Fontolith
description: A blocky custom font with a slight hint of... fantasy?
body:
# ![Fontolith banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd368590aab62958aca208c1b693de72ce310dcb.png)
### Tired of the regular vanilla minecraft font? Want something more... blocky and stylish than the default option? 
Then you should try the brand new totally hip and cool resourcepack _Fontolith!_

Blocky and with a slight hint of fantasy, Fontolith will solve all your font problems _and even do your laundry!_
# ![Fontolith showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3990df24806f1c06eb6f5b757f641c91f30f6bf0.png)

_P.S: Won't actually do your laundry._
